message:
feat(acfs): introduce configurable ACFS_BIN_DIR, harden path resolution, and expand runtime deployment sync

Replace all hardcoded ~/.local/bin binary placement with a configurable
ACFS_BIN_DIR that persists in state.json and propagates through every
layer of the install/update/doctor/nightly pipeline. This enables
shared-machine deployments where binaries must live outside the target
user's home directory (e.g. /usr/local/bin).

Key changes across all 40 files:

Configurable primary bin directory (ACFS_BIN_DIR):
- install.sh: Add acfs_ensure_primary_bin_dir, acfs_link_primary_bin_command,
  acfs_install_executable_into_primary_bin, and acfs_primary_bin_dir_uses_root
  helpers that handle both user-owned and root-owned bin dirs via sudo
- install_helpers.sh: Mirror the same helpers for use by generated scripts and
  update.sh, with acfs_validate_primary_bin_dir guard
- state.sh: Persist bin_dir in state.json alongside target_home
- acfs-global, acfs-update: Read bin_dir from state via read_bin_dir_from_state_file,
  propagate ACFS_BIN_DIR through env when exec'ing the real acfs/update script
- nightly_update.sh: Read persisted bin_dir from state at startup, prepend to PATH,
  search ACFS_BIN_DIR and ~/.acfs/bin for acfs-update before legacy fallbacks
- services-setup.sh: Build target_path_prefix from ACFS_BIN_DIR, search ~/.acfs/bin
  in find_user_bin candidates

Manifest and generated scripts:
- acfs.manifest.yaml: All tool installs (claude, codex, gemini, supabase, onboard,
  wrangler, acfs, acfs-update) now use acfs_install_executable_into_primary_bin or
  acfs_link_primary_bin_command instead of raw mkdir+install/ln to ~/.local/bin;
  installed_check commands probe ACFS_BIN_DIR with fallback to ~/.local/bin;
  verify commands use target_bin variable; wrangler gets a bun-shim fallback
  when node is absent
- generate.ts: Generated script preamble now validates and exports ACFS_BIN_DIR;
  doctor check runner validates ACFS_BIN_DIR and prepends it to target_path
- All 17 scripts/generated/*.sh files regenerated to reflect the new preamble,
  ACFS_BIN_DIR validation, and updated install/verify commands

PATH normalization (Atuin and ~/.acfs/bin everywhere):
- Login shell PATHs in .profile and .zprofile now include ~/.atuin/bin; legacy
  PATH lines without it are upgraded in-place via sed
- install.sh, update.sh, doctor.sh, info.sh, status.sh, export-config.sh,
  smoke_test.sh, stack.sh, install_helpers.sh: PATH construction prepends
  ACFS_BIN_DIR, ~/.local/bin, and ~/.acfs/bin (deduplicated)
- zsh.sh: install_acfs_zshrc now creates/upgrades .profile and .zprofile with
  Atuin-aware PATH; .zshrc no longer emits the .zshrc.local source line
  (acfs.zshrc handles it)
- acfs-nightly-update.service: systemd PATH includes ~/.acfs/bin and ~/.atuin/bin
- update.sh: New sync_acfs_zprofile_paths upgrades legacy zprofile PATH lines
  during acfs update

Hardened target_home validation:
- All read_target_home_from_state variants (in changelog.sh, cheatsheet.sh,
  continue.sh, dashboard.sh, export-config.sh, info.sh, status.sh, support.sh)
  now validate target_home is non-empty, absolute, not "/", and strip trailing
  slashes
- doctor.sh: Validates TARGET_HOME before and after state file lookup
- install_helpers.sh, generate.ts, all generated scripts: Error messages changed
  from "Unable to resolve TARGET_HOME" to "Invalid TARGET_HOME for 'user': value"
  and explicitly reject "/" as a valid home

Expanded runtime deployment sync:
- update.sh sync_acfs_deployed: Now syncs doctor.sh, acfs-update, services-setup.sh,
  info.sh, status.sh, changelog.sh, export-config.sh, continue.sh, session.sh,
  cheatsheet.sh, dashboard.sh, support.sh, plus all scripts/generated/*.sh files
- update.sh sync_acfs_global_wrapper: New function to sync scripts/acfs-global to
  /usr/local/bin/acfs (with root privilege escalation)
- install.sh finalize: Now deploys status.sh, changelog.sh, export-config.sh, and
  support.sh; generated acfs phase no longer short-circuits (continues to legacy
  finalize for full runtime parity)

Dashboard fix:
- dashboard.sh: Add missing 'continue' after --port/--host shift to prevent
  argument parsing from falling through

Tests:
- test_install_helpers.bats: Updated PATH expectations for ~/.acfs/bin; added tests
  for TARGET_HOME="/" rejection and ACFS_BIN_DIR validation in
  acfs_ensure_primary_bin_dir
- test_update.bats: 192 new lines testing zprofile PATH upgrade, generated script
  validation (minimal .zshrc loader, Atuin-aware login paths, wrangler bun shim,
  TARGET_HOME/ACFS_BIN_DIR rejection), diagnostic helper PATH assertions, runtime
  deployment sync coverage, and bin_dir state persistence through wrappers and
  nightly service
- test_changelog_export_status.sh: New tests for acfs-update and acfs-global
  wrappers passing bin_dir from state
- test_doctor_generated.sh: Updated expected error message for TARGET_HOME
  resolution failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
